entry.title: Retrieve FIORI Adaptation project from SAP ABAP system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In my organization, a developer created a adaptation project and deployed in ABAP system, and its working fine. Now this project is not pushed on GIT.

I got a requirement to do some changes like adding some additional fields in same adaptation project. 

So I wanted to know how to retrieve the adaptation project from SAP Abap system to BAS to make changes. Could you please help me with steps. Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Dhiraj

entry.title: Re: Webhooks in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
@rocsharma 

Its better you can modify slightly in your code to use SAP Destination Services which you can store your SSC URL,  username , password and use the Destination Name in ´the manifest.yml .. We did the same in our project.

Thanks to @JoEng for providing the git repo template to get understand and we as implementation consultant have to think better to adjust according to our need as security concern.

entry.title: Re: Partner TDD Onboarding for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Guide for Common Issues
entry.content: Great Job for S/4HANA CLOUD PC

entry.title: Re: Performance comparison: FILTER vs LOOP vs FOR
entry.content: My conclusion concerning the performance between "VALUE #( FOR" and "LOOP AT": there's a constant overhead of 4 microseconds for "VALUE #( FOR" on my system (whatever the number of lines in the internal table). It's the same kind of meaningless difference as between LOOP AT ... ASSIGNING and LOOP AT ... REFERENCE INTO (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides · GitHub: "Additionally, data access via field symbols is slightly faster than data access via references. This is only noticable when loops make up a significant part of the runtime of the program and is often not relevant...")

It looks nice to have animated in our app from your example you have described in this blog, it really helped. We have one question, how to adjust the layout for lottie extensions which we are struggling

@EsmeeA @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content:
Hi @GregMalewski ,

Thanks for your suggestion. 

I have a doubt and need your help.

Requirement:- My team member created a adaptation project and deployed on ABAP repository system. Now this adaptation project not pushed on GIT. 

Now I got some requirement to add additional field to same adaptation project. So wanted to check with you, can I retrieve the existing adaption project in BAS from ABAP system to modify the changes?

if yes, then could you please share the step.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Dhiraj

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Planning Version unable to display empty Co...
entry.content:
Hi @yoursraghu986,

In input control version there is no data this is the reason you can't select this.

You need to "Unbooked on" in version management from right side builder panel.

Or you can put 0 for each measure so user will input it. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Planning Version unable to display empty Co...

entry.title: Re: Runtime Error LOAD_PROGRAM_CLASS_MISMATCH
entry.content: If you get the dump, go to ST22, select the dump and click on SAP Recommandation button. It will fix the short dump.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

entry.title: Print Queue S/4 output management is not working for zpl printers
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am SAP form service by adobe to render PDF and using Print queue to transmit spool on to the system.

The spool generates without errors for PDF and XML device types and when it is ZPL the spool is generated with errors.

Process on how i am generating this spool.
-> In Maintain print queue Firor app we are maintain print queue name, format, printer destination, etc.
-> I am calling ADS REST API to render PDF 
-> Once the PDF is rendered, I am using class cl_print_queue_util which is storing the data at this app and transmits spool on to the system.

But spool only generates without error for PDF and XML devices type and for ZPL spool generated with errors

can anyone help here?

Note: XDC was also assigned for that ZPL device type.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: How to impact new batch number creation ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to implement custom logic, base on which system will:

create new batch number for received material

or will use the last batch number for that specific material

which exit shoud I use?

entry.title: Re: how to set Granted user's company as a target population
entry.content: If the permissions are same then, create 1 group as granted for each administrator. Create 1 group as target for each administrator. So 10 granted and 10 target groups and  assign these groups to the role.

entry.title: reference a custom field in business rule
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to create a business rule that filters the accessibility through the use of one of the custom fields. But it is hard to find this field under the "Context" tree. I have set the custom field "custom01" using the "Manage Business Configuration" and then under "Employee Profile" I chose "standard" to reach for the custom field configuration. Any clue on how/where to find that custom field?

entry.title: Re: How to update Section Code for Posted Document: SAP P...
entry.content:
​Hello,

Please note: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the Journal Entry Post API does not directly support including the Section Code field during posting. However, two primary approaches address this limitation.

First Option: Set a Default Section Code for Supplier Transactions
By customising the vendor master data, you can configure a default Section Code (e.g., "1000") for all supplier transactions. This involves setting the Section Code in the vendor's master record, which the system will then default to related transactions.​

Steps:

  • Navigate to the vendor master data maintenance.
  • Enter the desired Section Code ("1000") in the appropriate field.
  • Save the changes.​

This approach ensures that all transactions involving this vendor automatically inherit the specified Section Code.

Second option: Utilise Custom Fields via In-App Extensibility
If setting a default in the vendor master data is not feasible, you can create a custom field to capture the Section Code during the journal entry posting process. This method leverages SAP's in-app extensibility features.​

Steps:

  • Access the "Custom Fields and Logic" app in the SAP Fiori launchpad.
  • Create a new custom field with the appropriate data type and label (e.g., "Section Code").
  • Enable the field for the relevant business context, such as "Accounting: Journal Entry Item."
  • Enabling the field under the "SOAP APIs" tab will ensure it is available in the Journal Entry Post API.
  • Implement any necessary logic to default the value to "1000" if required.​

This approach allows for greater flexibility and ensures that the Section Code is captured during posting.​

Post-Posting Updates
If none of the above approaches is suitable, and you need to update the Section Code after posting, you can consider the following below,

  • Use the "Manage Journal Entries" app to update the Section Code in posted documents manually.
  • Develop a custom report or use mass maintenance tools to update the Section Code in bulk.​

Note that post-posting updates may impact reporting and compliance, so it's essential to ensure that such changes are audited and documented appropriately.​

Hope it helps!

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Logs to check who deployed/undeployed the iFlow
entry.content: I believe it's only who deployed it but not who undeployed it. Right?

entry.title: Stock-Single Material Fiori app
entry.content:
The key features of the 'Stock - Single Material' Fiori application are

  • The user can enter the product ID, and the screen automatically displays all the stock information. The beauty of the Fiori design user interface is that you do not have to click anywhere; just enter the product ID, and the desired stock information is right in front of you.
  • The stock information is bifurcated into various types, such as unrestricted, valuation blocked stock, quality inspection, returns, transfer stock, GR blocked stock, reserved, etc. Although this feature was available in the MMBE tcode in SAP ECC also, here the user interface is better. Please refer to the screenshot below.

 

  • The reporting date in this application represents the date on which the stock situation is represented.
  • There is a button on the right-hand side top that can help to represent the stock situation in graphical form. This point is important because handling graphical data is a key capability of the HANA database.

 

  • Users can enlarge the stock information with the help of the enlarge button on the top right-hand side.

 

  • There is a bar code feature with this application. When this app is used to scan a bar code then 
  • From a basic information point of view, this Fiori app has few similarities with MMBE tcode in GUI but from user interface and new features point of view, it is far ahead of MMBE.
  • Next important feature is stock history in graphical format. Graphical format gives a clear view of the stock level on a timeline of the last 12 months and also shows the comparison with minimum safety stock. You can zoom in on the particular part of the graph and see the details of the stock level. You can also drill down to daily history.

 

 

  • When you drill down stock at a certain data point, then it can show you the date on which goods movement (GR/GI) was done and the material document number as well.

So above are the important features of the Single Stock Material Fiori app. Not all these features were not available in SAP ECC.

entry.title: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am sorry to ask this stupid question, but I did not find the answer by myself.

I am working on a SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud 2502 system, and I know that some custom fiori applications were developed in this system, some of which are based on the fiori elements model.

I am able to find the RAP cloud ABAP code written for the fiori elements applications in Eclipse ADT, OK. But How to see the "application code" generated in Business Application Studio BAS?

How in BTP, Business Application Studio, can I find the source code of the fiori elements applications, as well as the non fiori applications? I tried looking everywhere, but I do not see them when I connect to my own dev space, in BAS, from BTP tool.

Thank you for your help

entry.title: SAP as a career
entry.content: I recently started learning SAP (MM), and even though I come from an IT background, I’ve developed a strong interest in this module. Are there career opportunities in SAP? Do companies hire freshers in this field? I'm currently 24 years old.

entry.title: Re: LSMW for general task list change
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I know this is old post, however if I can give some more input which might help our functional Consultants in the future.

Thanks to Terence.

1.Create LSMW recording

2.In the task list page, type F6, to go to TL header.

3.This will allow you to change TL header text, Header work center, usage, planner group, overall status, Header System condition

4.In the task list header page, type Shift+F4, to go to TL Operation.

5.In the TL Operation page, select first operation manually and type OBSE in T.Code area.

6.This will allow you to enter TL group, Group counter, Operation No. and Object (O). Continue.

7.In the TL Operation page, type Shift+F5, to go to TL Operation Internal.

8.This will allow you to change Standard text key, Operation text, Op. work center, Control key, Op. System condition, Op. Floc, Execution factor, Number, duration, duration unit, calculation key, activity type etc.

9.In the TL Operation Internal page, type Ctrl+S or Save.

10.Prepare the data file for all the TL Operations to be modified.

11.Test the program.

Kind regards,

Raj

entry.title: Re: Erroneous Authentication Popup when Previewing Fiori Application in BAS
entry.content:
Hi,
Creating a new dev space is resulted with a new URL (since it is including the unique dev space ID), therefore I wonder if this is related to browser cache / cookies issue somehow after a first successful authentication from your application preview (which could be no longer valid after your local docker container restart).
I'm not sure exactly why this happens, but I can suggest trying a better workaround than creating a new dev space for the next time this happens: 
You can try opening developer tools of your browser, find in the network tab the request to your OData service failing with authentication error, and after right clicking on it you can select the option to clear browser cache / cookies for this specific request domain. Then simply refresh your browser tab to trigger the request again.
(tested on Chrome browser).

Thanks,
Rotem

entry.title: Let's Organize our Life
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One community

Today I want to talk about how you could with a few simple actions, group and sort any list view to better analyze the data in front of you.

Let’s look at this video to learn more.

You can find additional information in the SAP Business One Web client user guide and the Learning journey.

Regards

Ari

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)

entry.title: Email Trigger Issue with OAuth2Password Authentication in SAP CAPM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We were previously using an email destination with Basic Authentication, and it was working as expected. However, as you're aware, Basic Authentication has been deprecated in Office 365, so we have now updated the authentication type to OAuth2Password.
After this change, we are unable to trigger emails from our SAP CAP application.
Error Message: The destination 'name: sap_process_automation_mail' does not contain host or port information as properties. Please configure in the "Additional Properties" of the destination. 
If anyone has encountered a similar scenario or has insights into this issue, your suggestions or assistance would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Navigator API
entry.content:
I'd like to know if there's an API for the SAP Signavio Process Navigator in sap.me. I'd want the API to be able to filter the different solution scenarios/processes  and access their accelerators.  I'm happy to use another API that'll do the same. I essentially need to filter different solution scenarios based on country and version, and then be able to access their accelerator information.

I'm fine if I'm able to download all the processes' accelerators at once too. Currently, through the UI, I'm only able to download only 5 at a time.

entry.title: Re: Email Trigger Issue with OAuth2Password Authenticatio...
entry.content: The documentation for the destinationsap_process_automation_mail can be found at Configure an SMTP Mail Destination. If you can confirm that this issue also occurs with SAP Build Process Automation you should file an issue via SAP Support. If you need support how to use this destination with CAP please post more details how you call the destination.

entry.title: Re: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Ap...
entry.content: The source code should be tracked in a Git repository.

entry.title: Re: SNOTE: SAP object cannot be assigned to package Z***t
entry.content:
• Go to se80 and open the package page.
  • Check if the Package is marked as below  "Main Package" or  "Adding further objects not possible". 
  • it should be de-selected if you want to add objects to that package

entry.content:

Has anyone faced this issue before? What could be the cause and how can I fix it?

entry.title: Re: sort table by custom added column
entry.content: the only options are to sort by the amount in a specific column, and not by amount in that calculated column like the second image shows

entry.title: Re: Stay Up to Date with the UI5 Renovate Preset Config
entry.content:
Hi Florian,

Great tool and I will explore it... but as I understand this is to always push our project to the latest SAPUI5 version, but what happens in a more conservative environments (large enterprises) where changing constantly to the latest version is not and option and developers and ops teams wants to keep the systems as much a stable as possible.

Do you know if there is a tool like Renovate but that basically scan your repository and identify SAPUI5 applications running ui5 versions that are currently deprecated or which deprecation/out of maintenance date will happen in the next 6 month?

I appreciate your feedback.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am a Software Engineer with 18 years of experience in the Microsoft technology stack, including ASP.NET, C#, SQL Server, and Azure. While I have spent most of my career working with Microsoft technologies, I am now exploring SAP and looking forward to expanding my skills into the SAP ecosystem.

As someone new to SAP, I am excited to learn from this amazing community, share ideas, and connect with others on a similar journey. Any tips, resources, or learning paths are always welcome!

Looking forward to growing and contributing here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am originally from Pakistan and currently living in Saudi Arabia.

Excited to be part of this global SAP community and looking forward to connecting with people from around the world!

entry.title: Re: Change the description of AaKF in a planning area SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @contovhal,

With an Attribute As Key Figure (AAKF), you have the following places where you find information on the names / descriptions:

  • Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Attribute As Key Figures > [Attribute ID] > Planning Area Attribute Description

You will not that, here, you can not change the Planning Area Attribute Description. Nor can you add the Attribute via Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Attributes. So, to answer your question: no, you can not change the Name of the Attribute As Key Figure via 'Planning Areas'. You will see this Planning Area Attribute Description appearing in your Master Data Workbook (Excel Add-In) or in your 'Manage Master Data' app in the WebUI. However, you can change the name and description of this Attribute via the WebUI in the app 'Attributes'. Note that this will likely require re-activation.

Now, if you are not interested in the Master Data, but rather in the Key Figure name, then please read below. Note that these are not directly connected.

Once you have configured an AAKF, you will also see the Key Figure ID (same as Attribute ID) appearing in the following location:

  • Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Key Figures > [Attribute ID = Key Figure ID] > Name / Description

Note that the Key Figure Name chosen here will be the one which is visible in the Planning Views. The Description is intended for further explanation of the Key Figure.

I hope this helped.

Kind regards,
Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: What is the first item in the left hand-side navigati...
entry.content:
EDIT: it has just been fixed April 18th, 2025 (https://github.com/sap-tutorials/Tutorials/issues/23430).

Now the correct answer is "Account Explorer".

entry.title: Re: Source list S4/HANA - several vendors marked "fixed"
entry.content:
Dear projectandsourcingoffice,

in S4/HANA public cloud two or more fixed vendors are not possible

What I know from ECC in the past this was different. But normally the system searches the entries in the responsible table and find the first valid one, this is not according to any logic - it is the first possible one with the table keys.

Nevertheless if you want to procure from two or more vendors "fixed" and get your purchase requisition assigned to the fix vendors then i recommend using the quotation function - below attached.

Two vendors are assigned in source list

On quotation header for the material

On item level two different vendors we share the quantity two vendors if needed

Best regards Dennis

Hnin

entry.title: Overcoming the Lack of Long-Term Memory in Large Language Models (LLMs)
entry.content:
Problem Definition: Lack of Long-Term Memory in LLMs

Large Language Models (LLMs) like GPT-4 have revolutionized the field of natural language processing, enabling machines to generate human-like text with impressive accuracy. However, one of the significant limitations of LLMs is their lack of long-term memory. This means that LLMs do not retain information between interactions, treating each conversation independently. This limitation can lead to repetitive responses and a lack of continuity in interactions, which can be problematic in various industry applications.

Industry-Relevant Examples

  1. Customer Support: In customer support systems, LLMs are used to assist customers with their queries. However, the lack of long-term memory means that the model cannot remember previous interactions with the same customer. This can lead to repetitive questions and a lack of personalized service, reducing customer satisfaction.
  2. Healthcare: In healthcare applications, LLMs can assist in providing medical information and support. However, without long-term memory, the model cannot remember a patient's history or previous interactions, which is crucial for providing accurate and personalized medical advice.
  3. Education: In educational tools, LLMs can help students with their learning process. However, the lack of long-term memory means that the model cannot remember a student's progress or previous questions, leading to a less effective learning experience.

Techniques to Overcome the Limitations

To address the lack of long-term memory in LLMs, several techniques can be employed:

1. Session Memory

Session memory helps maintain context within a single interaction or session. This is particularly useful for applications requiring continuity, such as customer support or tutoring systems. For example:

  • Redis: Redis provides a session manager that stores and retrieves conversation history, allowing LLMs to maintain context within a session. This helps in creating a coherent and continuous interaction by appending previous conversation history to each subsequent call

2. Context Awareness

Context awareness enhances the model's ability to understand and utilize the context of the conversation effectively. This is crucial for tasks that require a deep understanding of the context, such as tool use or complex reasoning:

  • Attention Mechanisms: Techniques like Attention Buckets allow LLMs to process input through multiple parallel processes, each with a distinct attention pattern. This helps in capturing and retaining crucial contextual information 
  • Mixture of In-Context Experts (MoICE): This method involves using multiple attention heads, each focusing on different contextual positions. It dynamically selects the needed positions to ensure no critical information is overlooked 

3. Tool Integration

Tool integration involves connecting LLMs with external tools and APIs to extend their capabilities. This is essential for providing up-to-date information and performing specific tasks:

  • Function Calling: LLMs can call external functions or APIs to fetch real-time data or perform actions. For instance, integrating weather APIs allows the model to provide current weather updates.
  • Custom Pipelines: Industries like healthcare and finance often use custom pipelines to integrate LLMs with their internal systems. This enables the models to access and process private data securely, enhancing their utility and accuracy.

4. Prompt Engineering

Prompt engineering involves crafting specific and clear prompts to guide the LLMs to produce more accurate and relevant responses. For example, instead of asking "Summarize this article," you might ask "Summarize this article in three key points focusing on its methodology, findings, and implications" 

5. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines LLMs with information retrieval systems. The model retrieves relevant documents or data from a large corpus and uses this information to generate more accurate and contextually relevant responses 

6. Knowledge Distillation

Knowledge distillation involves training a smaller, more efficient model to mimic the behavior of a larger, more complex model. This helps in reducing computational costs while maintaining performance 

7. Fine-Tuning

Fine-tuning involves training the LLM on a specific dataset related to a particular domain or task. This helps in improving the model's performance for specialized applications 

8.Training from Scratch

In some cases, organizations may choose to train models from scratch using their own data. This approach is resource-intensive but allows for complete customization and optimization for specific needs 

9. Vector Embeddings and Search

Using vector embeddings and search techniques can help overcome context limits by enabling the model to understand and retrieve relevant information based on semantic similarity 

By employing these techniques, industries can significantly enhance the capabilities of LLMs, making them more effective and reliable for various applications. Understanding and addressing the limitations of LLMs is crucial for leveraging their full potential and ensuring their responsible use.

If you have any more questions or need further details, feel free to ask!

entry.title: Re: Update Number Range Interval->NR Status in SAP HCM fr...

entry.title: Re: BDC on t- code EC60

entry.title: What does Total Selected Terms Mean
entry.content:
Hi

 

How does Total Selected Terms Work. This condition is in Approval Process.

 

SELECT 'True' FROM DUMMY WHERE TO_DATE('Total Selected Terms:','DD-MM-YYYY') >= TO_DATE('01-04-2024','DD-MM-YYYY') AND TO_DATE('Total Selected Terms:','DD-MM-YYYY') <= Last_day(ADD_months(CURRENT_DATE,-2));

 

Thanks

entry.title: DISTINCT OCRD from OINV
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm trying to get DISTINCT contact info based on invoices in a specific time frame. Specifically, this is related to the onboarding of the Avalara Tax add-on. I have written a query to get the information I need and it works with the exception that the contact information is not DISTINCT and I cannot figure out how to get it to be. Any help here is appreciated, please! B1 v10 HANA

Here is the query:

SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."CardType", T0."GroupCode", T0."CmpPrivate", T0."Address", T0."Building", T0."StreetNo", T0."ZipCode", T0."City", T0."County", T0."State1", T0."Country", T0."CntctPrsn", T0."E_Mail", T0."Phone1", T0."LicTradNum", T2."Tel1", T2."U_Ext", T2."E_MailL"

FROM OCRD T0 INNER JOIN OINV T1 ON T0."CardCode" = T1."CardCode" INNER JOIN OCPR T2 ON T1."CntctCode" = T2."CntctCode"

WHERE T1."DocDate" >= '20240101'

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model: What’s New as of 2025-04-03?
entry.content:
Hello, SAP users!  

We’re excited to share the latest updates to the SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Universal Model (SAP PaPM Cloud UM). These new features are designed to make processes smoother, improve decision-making, and boost performance.  

Whether you're a long-time user or just getting started, these updates bring valuable enhancements to help you achieve better results. 

If you want to catch up on previous updates, check out our past blog posts here - https://community.sap.com/t5/tag/PaPMCloudUMWhatsNew/tg-p. 

 Let’s take a look at what’s new this month!  

Model

Manage Environment

User can now choose how to deactivate environment:  

  • Option #1 (Current deactivation process): All flags are set to “Yes”;
  • Option #2 (New): All flags are set to “No”;
  • Option #3 (New): Only the “Delete all dependent data” flag is set to “Yes”, while all other flags remain “No”. 

Users can now deactivate environments with All flags set to No. This is a new behavior of Deactivation process. After doing so, environment’s state is set to ‘Inactive’. However, this deactivated environment using All options set to “No” cannot be removed. Not until all dependencies are removed. To remove all dependencies, user needs to reactivate the environment, then deactivate it with All flags set to ‘Yes! 

In addition, one more scenario is also possible: to deactivate environment with the delete data only set to “Yes” and all other flags are set to “No”. In this case, environment state is set to ‘Not Current’. Also, this deactivated environment cannot be removed! However, to set the environment to inactive, user can set all flags to ‘Yes’ and then user can already remove the environment. 

This change provides more flexibility to modeling —especially during planning cycles, testing scenarios, or model shifts.

 

Manage Environment - Model Screen

Navigation to the Show Screen is now possible through the hierarchy list, so you no longer need to access it only from the Network tab. This link can be found in the Hierarchy table and will only be visible if the environment is activated.

Additionally, a context menu is available in the Hierarchy. Simply right-click to execute actions such as Run, Show Details or Attributes of a function, Show Data, Copy, and Delete. This provides an alternative way to streamline your workflow.

 

Manage Model View

A new validation has been implemented for Model View field configuration if there’s a relation/deep nested field is used or defined as an Input Field in the Fields section.  

The Input Field is being defined in the Fields section of Model View as this field is coming from the input that can be processed further. It means that the user can further perform aggregation, exclude it from the result, map it to another field or perform a value selection.  

If a relation/deep nested field is added but no selection is defined/maintained, it cannot be excluded (Exclude checkbox) as it doesn’t make any data enrichment. This field does not originate from the Model View's Input Function at first, and thus not required to be added in the Field configuration if no additional data enrichment is needed.  

With this, if this scenario is being performed during configuration, upon saving the function, a validation message will prompt stating “Excluding Nested field is redundant. Please remove the entry”.  

This was introduced to avoid system failures, for example case when activation of Environment that contains Model View Type: Projection which uses field from Inherited Relation that has configuration Exclude = Yes (checked) results to failed.

 

 

Manage Model Calculation

From previous enhancements of Manage Calculations Functions the Edit button was introduced on the Assignment section of Rules. This button aids the user to easily maintain a formula in the editor as it provides suggestions of keywords. During the initial release of the functionality, the user waits for some time before the suggested words appear. 

A major aspect of the enhancement is the increased response time of the system and after this, words now appear immediately while the user types a string in the formula editor. 

 

Report

Manage Reports - Tile Element

Inspired by the role-based experience of SAP Fiori Launchpad, this update brings to reports a familiar tile-based element. Whether you're surfacing critical data, linking to important content, or simply organizing information visually—Tile Elements help you do it with elegance and precision. 

Creating and Editing the Tile 

  • New button labeled “Insert Tile Element” is available in Page Edit Mode;
  • Clicking the “Insert Tile Element” button opens  “Create Tile Element” dialog. The dialog allows the user to configure the tile with: title, description and icon (all optional). 

Upon creation, user can: 

  • edit the tile by adding/changing name & description, that is will be displayed in the tile;
  • add text and/or any report element (show element, data element, rule element, reference) inside the tile;
  • add reference;
  • re-size the tile;
  • delete the tile.

Tile Display Logic when reference is assigned: 

  • If a semantic link reference is assigned, the tile is displayed on Report only if the referenced page is visible to the user. (if tile is referenced to the page user does not have access to, the tile will not be visible for the user),
  • Clicking the tile navigates the user to the assigned reference target. 

 

User 1 Accessing Reports (tile is visible)


User 2 Accessing Reports (tile is not visible)

 

That’s it for now!

I hope this new feature and enhancement makes your work with SAP PaPM UM better. Stay tuned for more “What’s New” post. Share this blogpost with your colleagues and friends. Thank you!

entry.title: VBA Copy Paste PO Number and Material From VA03.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Kindly help me,I want to copy the content of PO Number and Material on T-code VA03.
I have the Record script attached:

session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/NVA03"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").text = "2230495264"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").caretPosition = 10
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4021/txtVBKD-BSTKD").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4021/txtVBKD-BSTKD").caretPosition = 19
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 2
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\09/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4351/txtVBKD-BSTKD").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\09/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4351/txtVBKD-BSTKD").caretPosition = 19
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 3
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4400/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4900/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_AUFTRAG/ctxtRV45A-MABNR[1,1]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4400/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4900/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_AUFTRAG/ctxtRV45A-MABNR[1,1]").caretPosition = 10

ThisWorkbook.Sheets("TES").Range("F2").PasteSpecial SkipBlanks:=True

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Haydi Mohamed, and I am currently serving as Project Manager for the implementation of SAP CAR at Ez Pharma in Egypt. I am pleased to share that I have successfully completed the learning journey titled Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery.

In light of my achievement, I am reaching out to inquire about the availability of any campaigns or initiatives offering free vouchers for the certification exam associated with this learning journey. Obtaining this certification is an important step in my professional development and will further contribute to the success of SAP projects within my organization.

I appreciate your time and assistance in supporting learners like myself, and I look forward to hearing from you regarding any opportunities that may be available.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Haydi Mohamed

entry.title: Re: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Ap...
entry.content: fiori frontend code is managed out side of abap server, which is different from traditional abap object. only your company/previous devloper knows where the source code is hosted.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Greetings, SAP Community,

I am delighted to join this incredible network of professionals and innovators. My name is Haydi Mohamed, and I serve as the SAP Project Manager for SAP CAR at EZ Pharm, based in Egypt.

With a passion for streamlining retail processes and delivering data-driven solutions, I am thrilled to contribute and learn from this dynamic community. SAP CAR empowers businesses with real-time analytics and seamless integration, and I am dedicated to leveraging its capabilities to drive impactful results at EZ Pharm.

I look forward to connecting with all of you, sharing experiences, exchanging ideas, and fostering collaborations that lead to growth and success. Together, we can continue to push the boundaries of technology and innovation.

Warm regards,

Haydi Mohamed

entry.title: Tax rate not maintain in FTXP for tax code but tax will be correctly count.
entry.content: In my client server the tax rate was not maintained in specific tax code but tax was correctly counted in invoice my task was to check the what exactly the config maintain for that. There was not maintain any ABAP code for that and i also check FV11,VK11,V/06,V/08

entry.title: #SITRIO2025 Onde o caldo entorna - Como superar os maiores desafios na implementação do DRC NFE
entry.content:
Se você trabalha com SAP, localização Brasil ou NF-e, já deve ter ouvido falar sobre a migração do GRC para o DRC NFE. E se ainda não enfrentou essa transição, prepare-se: ela não é trivial. Por isso, o título da palestra de Renan Correa no SAP Inside Track Rio 2025 não poderia ser mais apropriado: "Onde o caldo entorna - Como superar os maiores desafios na implementação do DRC NFE".

Sobre o palestrante

Renan Correa é consultor SAP desde 2009, com experiência aprofundada em localização Brasil, NF-e e eInvoice para toda a América Latina. Ele é membro ativo da comunidade SAP, autor de blogs, artigos e livros técnicos, e também atua como instrutor de treinamentos nas áreas de SD/NFe, DRC e TDF. Além disso, é conhecido pela sua abordagem direta e didática sobre temas complexos.

O que esperar da palestra

Durante sua apresentação no evento, Renan vai guiar o público pelos principais percalços e soluções na implementação do DRC NFE:

  • Testes insuficientes e ambientes mal configurados: uma das principais fontes de falhas está na migração incorreta de ambientes de testes para produção, gerando “dumps” e inconsistências.

  • PDFs e XMLs exigem customização: funcionalidades antes comuns como anexos de PDF ou carta de correção precisam ser redesenvolvidas no novo cenário.

  • Diferenças sutis, mas impactantes, entre GRC e DRC: o mapeamento de XMLs pode parecer igual, mas detalhes como caracteres especiais e campos obrigatórios geram rejeições.

  • A dor de cabeça chamada NFS-e: a nota fiscal de serviço é um dos pontos mais críticos, exigindo configurações e desenvolvimentos específicos por município.

  • Automatização de entrada é complexa: exige criação de diversas RFCs, revisão de BAdIs e ajustes em funções herdadas do GRC.

  • Processos Z: o segredo da flexibilidade: essenciais para adaptar o cockpit do DRC, os processos customizados demandam tempo e planejamento.

  • Retreinamento de usuários é essencial: mesmo com lógica semelhante, as telas são diferentes, e subestimar essa mudança compromete o sucesso do projeto.

Renan traz à tona uma visão realista e fundamentada nos projetos que participou, alertando sobre estimativas fantasiosas, resistências do cliente e a necessidade de um planejamento pragmático.

Se você é consultor, gestor de projeto ou trabalha na área fiscal de empresas que utilizam SAP, essa é uma palestra imperdível. Além de aprender como evitar que "o caldo entorne", você vai sair mais preparado para garantir uma implementação de sucesso.

Assista agora
Se você quer estar preparado para a realidade do TaaS e entender os impactos do fim do TAXBRA no seu dia a dia profissional, não perca esse vídeo. Acesse a palestra completa na gravação oficial do SAP Inside Track Rio 2025 e fique por dentro de tudo.

SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro 2025

 

Se você deseja ser notificado sobre os próximos eventos SAP Inside Track no Brasil, entre na nossa lista de interesse: Cadastre-se aqui para ser notificado

entry.title: Actions in Behavior Definition For CDS Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The scenario is;  I have created a RAP application that will display data from Web Service. CDS Custom entity was created and the query implementation class called Web service.

The next step is to save the data from my Fiori Report List into my custom Z* table and update the "Status" field on the Fiori List.

Why does the Read Entity result fail? 

What should be the way?

Kind regards, aatan.

entry.title: Re: How to automate clearing status of Bank Items when po...

Hi @Naveenk_S42024

I tried what you said but accounts were not cleared. They are still open. I did setup the Rules for bank statement using the F023 and F022 as manual transaction but it is still the same. 

highlighted items should be automatically cleared under the outgoing clearing account. 

Regards,

Melle

entry.title: PT tax for Madhaya Pradesh - issue
entry.content: PT tax for Madhaya Pradesh - Rs.33,334 and above, Rs.212 for the last month , only showing Rs.208
